image_prompt: A dynamic and playful scene depicting a group of colorful, exaggeratedly surprised cartoon characters (e.g., a squirrel, a bird, a small human figure) with their hair and clothes comically blowing backwards, struggling against an invisible but powerful gust of wind. Leaves and petals are swirling around them. The background is a vibrant, sunny park with trees swaying. The Portuguese text "O vento sopra." is depicted as if it's being carried by the wind itself, a wispy, cursive text moving across the scene. Highly detailed, animated style, bright and cheerful.
caption: Às vezes, a verdade mais simples é também a mais poderosa. Sente essa brisa? 🌬️ É a vida te lembrando das obviedades que movem o mundo! #VentoSopra #ObviedadesDaVida #ForçaDaNatureza #SimplesAssim #Reflexão
